text.title: Feature Flag Core Implementation Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the feature-flags-core-implementation methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: scaffold-manager
step.action: Create FeatureFlagManager class with register / load_env / load_file / is_enabled.

step.name: define-flag-catalog
step.action: Register each FeatureFlag dataclass with description + default + rollout_percent.

step.name: wire-decorator-and-middleware
step.action: Add @feature(name) decorator + ASGI middleware injecting flag context.

step.name: ops-loader
step.action: Load env first, file second, defaults third. Precedence test pinned.

step.name: lint-direct-reads
step.action: Add a CI step that rejects direct os.getenv('FF_*') outside the manager.
step.decision-gate: Reject ship if any direct read remains.
